questionHtml: Suggest other processes that may occur during neural development.
markschemeHtml:
a. neural tube differentiation/formation;

b. neuron (may) migrate to other parts;

c. axon (may) extend beyond the neural tube/myelinates;

d. synapses develop;

e. neural pruning;

Do not accept “connection” instead of “synapse”.

meta.title: Suggest other processes that may occur during neural development.
